nodes.name: Search Org Public Record
nodes.notes: Payload is the literal org name plus 'public record' only -- no project data ever leaves the box (B2).

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "qwen2.5:1.5b-instruct-q4_K_M", stream: false, prompt: "Extract exactly one verifiable public-record fact about this organization from the snippet. If nothing verifiable exists, respond with an empty string. Snippet: " + $json.compact_snippet }) }}

nodes.name: Extract One Fact (smaller model)
nodes.notes: Smaller model, separate from the 3-4B builder -- narrow task, doesn't need the larger class (A14).
